UpdateWindowText.Title: New update available
UpdateWindowText.Text: There is a new version of KSP Multiplayer available for download
UpdateWindowText.StillCompatible: Your current KSPMP version is compatible with the latest version
UpdateWindowText.NotCompatible: Your current KSPMP version is not compatible with the latest version
UpdateWindowText.InstallSuccessRestartKsp: KSPMP files were updated. Quit KSP completely and start it again to load the new KSPMP plugins.
UpdateWindowText.InstallValidationSizeMismatch: Size mismatch for {0} (expected {1} B, on disk {2} B).
UpdateWindowText.InstallFallingBackSaveZip: KSP is using the mod, so the folder cannot be patched. Saving the client package to your KSP install…
UpdateWindowText.InstallSuccessZipSaved: Client package saved to: {0}. Fully quit KSP, then open that zip, copy the GameData\KSPMultiplayer folder (from the KSPMPClient/GameData path) into your GameData, or extract with merge/replace, then start the game again.
UpdateWindowText.InstallErrorFilesInUseKsp: A mod file was in use and could not be replaced (KSP is still loading it). This usually means the game was not fully quit. If this persists after a full exit, use Open release page to download the client zip, quit KSP, and copy the KSPMultiplayer folder into GameData by hand.
UpdateWindowText.InstallExternalUpdateLaunched: A command window was started. KSP will be closed, then the client package is downloaded and installed. If it does not start, run: {0}
UpdateWindowText.InstallExternalUpdateStartFailed: Could not start the update command window: {0}
UpdateWindowText.InstallExternalUpdateWindowsOnly: The command-window update helper is only available on Windows.
